hero.title: Book Your Seat
hero.subtitle: Modern realtime seat booking platform for transportation companies. Beautiful seat maps, instant reservations, and powerful analytics.

features.title: Everything you need to run a modern transport business
features.subtitle: Built for transportation companies that demand excellence

realtime.title: Realtime Seat Booking
realtime.desc: Watch seats get booked in real-time. Multiple customers can browse simultaneously without conflicts.

seatBuilder.title: Visual Seat Builder
seatBuilder.desc: Design custom bus layouts with drag-and-drop. Set VIP, normal, and disabled seats with individual pricing.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.desc: Track revenue, occupancy rates, and booking trends with beautiful dashboards. Make data-driven decisions.

multiBus.title: Multi-Bus Fleet
multiBus.desc: Manage unlimited buses with different layouts. Perfect for growing transport companies.

bulkTrips.title: Bulk Trip Scheduling
bulkTrips.desc: Create hundreds of trips at once with daily, weekly, or custom intervals. Save hours of work.

payments.title: Payment Integration
payments.desc: Accept payments online with Stripe integration. Support for Egyptian Pound (EGP) transactions.

liveBooking.title: Watch realtime booking come alive
liveBooking.subtitle: Multiple customers browsing, seats getting selected, instant confirmations — all happening in real-time

items.quote: CrushCar transformed how we manage our fleet. The seat map is beautiful and customers love it.
items.author: Ahmed Hassan

items.quote: The realtime booking system eliminated overbooking completely. Our customers are happier than ever.
items.author: Sarah Mahmoud

items.quote: Beautiful UI, powerful backend. CrushCar is exactly what the Egyptian transport market needed.
items.author: Omar Farouk

pricing.title: Start free, scale as you grow
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just honest pricing.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: Perfect for small transport companies getting started

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: For growing companies that need more power

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large transport networks with custom needs

cta.title: Ready to transform your transport business?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of transport companies already using CrushCar. Start your free trial today.

footer.tagline: Modern transport management for the Egyptian market

landingHow.title: Three steps to better bookings
landingHow.createDesc: Add your fleet and design custom seat layouts with our visual builder
landingHow.tripsDesc: Set routes, times, and pricing for each journey. Bulk create hundreds at once.
landingHow.bookDesc: Customers choose seats visually and book instantly with realtime updates

confirmed.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmed.desc: Your seat has been reserved successfully

search.desc: Search for available routes and book your seat
search.tryAgain: Try adjusting your search or check back later

dashboard.addBuses: Add buses and design seat layouts

bookings.noBookingsDesc: Bookings will appear here when customers reserve seats
